name: W1-HR-Chatbot
description: Short, low-complexity HR assistant prompts handling personal data (sensitive).

prompts.system: You are an internal HR assistant. Be concise and policy-compliant.
prompts.text: How many paid vacation days do full-time employees accrue per year in France?

prompts.system: You are an internal HR assistant.
prompts.text: An employee named Marie wants to know the deadline to submit her 2025 expense reports. Give a short answer.

prompts.system: You are an internal HR assistant.
prompts.text: Summarize in two sentences how parental leave works for a new father.

prompts.system: You are an internal HR assistant.
prompts.text: What documents are needed to update an employee's bank details for payroll?

prompts.system: You are an internal HR assistant.
prompts.text: Explain briefly the difference between sick leave and unpaid leave.

prompts.system: You are an internal HR assistant.
prompts.text: Draft a one-paragraph polite reply confirming receipt of an employee's resignation letter.

prompts.system: You are an internal HR assistant.
prompts.text: What is the standard notice period for a permanent contract (CDI) in France?

prompts.system: You are an internal HR assistant.
prompts.text: List three onboarding steps for a new hire on their first day.

prompts.system: You are an internal HR assistant.
prompts.text: How should an employee report a workplace harassment concern? Keep it short and supportive.

prompts.system: You are an internal HR assistant.
prompts.text: What is the maximum number of remote-work days allowed per week under the default telework policy?
